commands.name: Refresh safe demo tour
commands.purpose: Regenerate the browser walkthrough used for the recording path.

commands.name: Refresh video readiness
commands.purpose: Confirm timing, screen safety, claim wording, and upload approval gate.

commands.name: Build screen-safe localhost recording preview
commands.purpose: Copy the public candidate to an isolated temporary preview stage, scan recording files, and produce a localhost preview command template.

commands.name: Review video upload metadata
commands.purpose: Confirm the upload title, description, tags, visibility, expected readback, and public video stop conditions before any upload.

commands.name: Public video upload preflight gate
commands.command: python scripts\verify_public_video_upload_gate.py --approval-phrase "Approve recording and public upload of the Agentic Incident Command Center demo video." --screen-safety-confirmed --duration-confirmed --claim-boundary-confirmed --content-rights-confirmed --upload-visibility-confirmed
commands.purpose: Require the exact public demo video approval phrase plus screen, duration, claim, rights, and visibility confirmations before manual capture or upload.

commands.name: Open recording review artifacts
commands.command: start reports\latest_demo_tour.html && start reports\latest_video_readiness.html && start reports\latest_video_recording_preview.html && start reports\latest_video_upload_metadata.html && start reports\latest_public_video_upload_preflight.html
commands.purpose: Review the demo path, readiness report, localhost preview preflight, upload metadata, and public video upload gate before any capture.

commands.name: Capture local recording after approval
commands.purpose: Record only the approved browser path with synthetic data and no private screens.

commands.name: Review recording before upload
commands.command: manual: watch the recording and check duration, screen safety, and claim wording
commands.purpose: Hold upload if private paths, credentials, account pages, or live Splunk/MCP overclaims appear.

commands.name: Upload public video after approval
commands.command: manual: upload the reviewed video to an approved public video host and capture the URL
commands.purpose: Create the public Devpost video URL only after explicit approval.

commands.name: Verify public artifact URLs before writeback
commands.purpose: Confirm the public GitHub repository and public demo video URL are reachable before writing them into local submission artifacts.

commands.name: Apply approved URLs locally
commands.purpose: Update the local Devpost URL source only after both public URLs are approved.

commands.name: Final local validation
commands.purpose: Confirm the submission packet is ready for final Devpost review.

boundary: This command plan is advisory only. It does not record, upload, publish, write URLs, update Devpost, or submit anything.
approval_required: Explicit user approval is required before recording capture, public video upload, or writing approved public URLs.
